---
toc: true
---

## Curiosity

Curiosity is ...

## Chapters in this section

::: {.section-card-grid}

::: {.section-card}
### Chapter 12: Recoding

blah blah blah

::: {.section-card}

blah blah blah

:::

::: {.section-card}

blah blah blah

[Open Chapter 14](ch14-chaining.html){.section-button}
:::


:::

## What to focus on

As you work through curiosity ...
